dosage_instructions: Discharged after appendectomy. Take amoxicillin 500mg twice daily for 7 days. Keep wound dry and return if fever or excessive pain develops.
Start metformin 500mg once daily with breakfast. Follow up with lab work in 2 weeks. Report dizziness or nausea.
Post-op checkup scheduled for June 30. Continue ibuprofen 200mg every 6 hours as needed. Avoid lifting heavy objects.
Second influenza vaccine due next Monday. No other medications. Contact clinic if flu-like symptoms occur.
Blood pressure medication adjusted to lisinopril 10mg daily. Repeat labs in 4 weeks. Seek care for chest pain.
Discharged after knee arthroscopy. Use acetaminophen 650mg every 6 hours. Keep dressing clean and monitor for swelling.
Continue levothyroxine 75mcg every morning on empty stomach. Avoid iron supplements within 4 hours. See doctor if palpitations start.
Cardiology visit scheduled for July 5. Continue aspirin 81mg daily. Report any unusual bruising.
Tetanus booster due this month. No contraindications noted. Reminder to bring vaccine card to appointment.
Cholesterol medication updated to atorvastatin 20mg nightly. Fasting lipid panel due in 6 weeks. Call clinic with muscle pain.
Discharged after tonsillectomy. Take hydrocodone 5mg every 6 hours as prescribed. Watch for dehydration and fever.
Start albuterol inhaler twice daily as needed. Keep rescue inhaler available. Seek urgent care for severe shortness of breath.
Dermatology follow-up next Thursday. Continue tretinoin 0.05% nightly. Avoid sun exposure.
COVID booster recommended this quarter. No current symptoms. Encourage vaccination if not yet received.
Diabetes medication increased to gliclazide 30mg daily. HbA1c check in 3 months. Monitor for hypoglycemia.
Discharged after hernia repair. Take cephalexin 500mg four times daily. Contact clinic for worsening redness or drainage.
Continue sertraline 50mg daily in the morning. Report increased anxiety or panic symptoms.
Orthopedic visit scheduled for July 12. Use ibuprofen 400mg every 8 hours. Limit weight-bearing activity.
Shingles vaccine recommended. No known allergies. Schedule appointment before month-end.
Warfarin dose adjusted to 4mg nightly. INR check in 1 week. Seek help for bleeding or severe bruising.
Discharged after sinus surgery. Use saline rinses twice daily. Call if severe headache or fever appears.
Continue omeprazole 20mg before breakfast. Avoid NSAIDs unless approved. Report black stools.
Gynecology visit scheduled for July 18. Continue calcium 1200mg daily. Contact office for abnormal bleeding.
Pneumococcal vaccine due this season. Remind patient to avoid exercise after injection if sore.
Aspirin therapy continued. LDL retest in 2 months. Watch for stomach upset and ringing in ears.
Discharged after cataract surgery. Use prescribed eye drops every 4 hours. Contact clinic for sudden vision loss.
Start losartan 50mg daily. Check blood pressure twice weekly. Seek care for swelling of lips or tongue.
Sleep study follow-up scheduled for August 1. Continue melatonin 3mg nightly. Avoid caffeine after noon.
Hepatitis B booster due next week. Confirm patient has no vaccine history on file.
Metformin dose maintained at 1000mg twice daily. Repeat A1c in 3 months. Contact office for vomiting or diarrhea.
Discharged after endoscopy. Take proton pump inhibitor before breakfast. Report any severe abdominal pain.
Continue simvastatin 40mg at bedtime. Avoid grapefruit juice. Report unexplained muscle weakness.
Dental cleaning visit scheduled for July 24. Continue fluoride rinse nightly. Bring prior X-rays if available.
Meningococcal vaccine recommended. No special precautions. Schedule around work hours.
Insulin regimen adjusted to 12 units before dinner. Glucose logs due weekly. Seek help for confusion or sweating.
Discharged after gallbladder surgery. Take oxycodone 5mg every 6 hours as needed. Call if jaundice develops.
Continue clopidogrel 75mg daily. Avoid skipping doses. Report easy bruising or bleeding gums.
Neurology visit scheduled for August 3. Continue gabapentin 300mg at bedtime. Monitor for dizziness.
RSV vaccine recommended for high-risk patient. Arrange appointment before flu season.
Levothyroxine increased to 100mcg daily. Recheck TSH in 6 weeks. Call clinic for palpitations.
Discharged after wrist surgery. Use ice packs and elevate hand. Take naproxen 500mg twice daily as needed.
Continue amlodipine 5mg daily. Keep follow-up BP log. Report swelling in ankles.
Ophthalmology appointment scheduled for July 31. Continue timolol drops twice daily. Avoid rubbing eyes.
Annual flu shot due. Report any known allergies before visit.
Continue lisinopril 20mg daily. Repeat potassium in 4 weeks. Call for weakness or cramps.
Discharged after appendectomy. Take cephalexin 500mg four times daily. Return if fever or increased redness occurs.
Start prednisone 10mg daily for 5 days. Monitor blood sugar and mood changes. Seek help for severe dizziness.
Pediatric checkup scheduled for August 10. Continue vitamin D 1000 units daily. Keep immunization record handy.
Tdap booster due. Ensure vaccination record is updated after visit.
Continue atorvastatin 10mg nightly. Fasting lipids due in 2 months. Watch for unusual muscle pain.
Discharged after ankle surgery. Take tramadol 50mg every 6 hours as needed. Keep weight off foot.
Continue allopurinol 100mg daily. Stay hydrated. Report rash or joint pain.
Primary care follow-up scheduled for August 13. Continue vitamin B12 injections monthly. Keep appointment card visible.
HPV vaccine due for young adult. Confirm consent form before visit.
Continue metformin 850mg twice daily. Repeat renal panel in 4 weeks. Contact office for vomiting or weakness.
Discharged after mole removal. Keep site clean and dry. Take acetaminophen 500mg every 6 hours as needed.
Continue doxycycline 100mg twice daily. Avoid dairy with medication. Report rash or light sensitivity.
Cardiology follow-up scheduled for August 16. Continue carvedilol 12.5mg twice daily. Report fatigue.
Pneumococcal booster recommended. Consider scheduling during next clinic visit.
Continue lisinopril 10mg daily. Repeat BP at home and bring log. Contact office for swelling.
Discharged after ear surgery. Use antibiotic drops as directed. Avoid water in ear canal.
Continue propranolol 20mg twice daily. Report slowed heart rate or dizziness.
Dermatology follow-up scheduled for August 20. Continue moisturizer therapy twice daily. Avoid harsh exfoliants.
MMR vaccine recommended for adults without documented immunity. Schedule if needed.
Continue warfarin 3mg nightly. INR check in 1 week. Report bleeding or severe bruising.
Discharged after sinus surgery. Take amoxicillin 500mg three times daily. Call if throat swelling develops.
Continue fluoxetine 20mg every morning. Avoid alcohol. Report worsening depression symptoms.
Orthopedic follow-up scheduled for August 23. Continue physical therapy exercises. Report increased pain.
Varicella vaccine recommended if not previously immune. Discuss with clinician.
Continue metformin 1000mg twice daily. Monitor blood sugar. Contact office for persistent vomiting.
Discharged after minor skin procedure. Use antibiotic cream twice daily. Watch for infection signs.
Continue sildenafil 50mg as needed. Avoid nitrates. Seek help for prolonged erection.
Gynecology follow-up scheduled for August 27. Continue iron supplement daily. Report heavy bleeding.
COVID booster recommended for eligible adult. Encourage completion before holiday travel.
Continue digoxin 0.125mg daily. Recheck levels in 2 weeks. Report vision changes.
Discharged after hernia repair. Take oxycodone 5mg every 6 hours as needed. Call if fever rises.
Continue montelukast 10mg nightly. Keep rescue inhaler available. Report wheezing.
ENT appointment scheduled for August 31. Continue antihistamine daily. Avoid allergens when possible.
Hepatitis A vaccine recommended if travel planned. Discuss timing with clinic.
Continue hydrochlorothiazide 25mg daily. Repeat potassium check in 4 weeks. Report cramps.
Discharged after wisdom tooth extraction. Use saline rinse after meals. Call if swelling worsens.
Continue duloxetine 30mg daily. Avoid alcohol. Report suicidal thoughts immediately.
Cardiology visit scheduled for September 2. Continue beta-blocker as prescribed. Report fainting.
Influenza vaccine recommended. Bring insurance card and ID.
Continue levothyroxine 50mcg daily. Recheck labs in 6 weeks. Report rapid heartbeat.
Discharged after vasectomy. Apply ice packs and rest. Take ibuprofen 400mg as needed.
Continue azithromycin 250mg daily. Finish full course. Report diarrhea or rash.
Family medicine visit scheduled for September 5. Continue vitamin C daily. Bring previous lab results.
Shingles vaccine due this month. Verify eligibility before scheduling.
Continue insulin glargine 20 units nightly. Recheck glucose log. Contact office for low sugar symptoms.
Discharged after tonsillectomy. Take acetaminophen 650mg every 6 hours. Hydrate well.
Continue metoprolol 25mg twice daily. Avoid sudden standing. Report fatigue or dizziness.
OB-GYN follow-up scheduled for September 8. Continue prenatal vitamins. Report cramping.
COVID booster recommended. Encourage staying up to date with vaccines.
Continue amlodipine 10mg daily. Repeat BP in 2 weeks. Report severe headache.
Discharged after ear tube surgery. Use prescribed ear drops twice daily. Avoid swimming for 1 week.
Continue sertraline 25mg nightly. Report any mood changes. Follow-up with clinician if symptoms worsen.
Physical therapy visit scheduled for September 12. Continue stretching exercises. Monitor pain levels.
Annual flu vaccine due. Encourage appointment before month-end.
Continue simvastatin 20mg nightly. Repeat cholesterol profile in 6 weeks. Call for unusual weakness.
